rules.title: Common Equity Tier 1 Minimum Ratio
rules.text: Firms must maintain a minimum Common Equity Tier 1 ratio of 4.5% of risk-weighted assets.

rules.title: Capital Conservation Buffer
rules.text: Firms must maintain a capital conservation buffer of 2.5% in addition to minimum capital requirements.

rules.title: UK Leverage Ratio
rules.text: Firms subject to the UK leverage ratio framework must maintain a minimum leverage ratio of 3.25%, calculated on an exposure measure that excludes qualifying central bank claims.

rules.title: Liquidity Coverage Ratio
rules.text: Firms must hold sufficient high-quality liquid assets to meet net outflows under a 30-day liquidity stress scenario, with a minimum LCR of 100%.
